name: Oriental Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the boneless, unmarinated chicken pieces into bite-sized pieces.
2. Melt butter in a skillet and add the chicken pieces and teriyaki sauce.
3. Cook until browned on all sides. Remove the chicken pieces to a plate.
4. Add the mushroom soup and milk to the skillet, stirring until smooth.
5. If needed, add a little extra milk for a better consistency with more chicken and vegetables.
6. Add the fresh mushrooms and cook for 3 minutes.
7. Return the cooked chicken pieces to the skillet.
8. Add the water chestnuts and bamboo shoots.
9. Simmer for 10 minutes.
10. Serve with rice and chow mein noodles.
Preparation Time: 30 minutes.
